sub_pixel_system.notes: Build Engine uses fixed-point arithmetic internally; exact sub-pixel precision not documented in provided sources

special_mechanics.name: Steroids Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Temporary movement speed boost item that increases Duke's movement speed and Mighty Foot attack power

special_mechanics.name: Jet Pack
special_mechanics.description: Equipment allowing vertical movement and access to otherwise inaccessible areas

special_mechanics.name: Aqua-lung
special_mechanics.description: Underwater breathing equipment enabling extended submersion periods

tier_notes: Tier 1 qualitative assessment. No specific physics values (velocities, gravity, acceleration) are documented in the provided sources. Wikipedia focuses on gameplay features and cultural impact; speedrun.com contains only leaderboard data; TCRF source is inaccessible per robots.txt policy. Build Engine technical specifications would require source code or technical documentation not present in these sources.
